message.content:
@startuml
participant InstallInstalling as InstallInstalling
participant PackageInstaller as PackageInstaller
participant PackageInstallerService as PackageInstallerService
participant InstallingAsyncTask as InstallingAsyncTask
participant PackageInstallerSession as PackageInstallerSession
participant Handler as Handler
participant mHandlerCallback as mHandlerCallback
participant PkMS as PkMS
participant PkMS.PackageHandler as PkMS.PackageHandler
participant PkMS.HandlerParams as PkMS.HandlerParams
participant PkMS.InstallParams as PkMS.InstallParams

participant InstallInstalling as InstallInstalling
participant PackageInstaller as PackageInstaller
participant PackageInstallerService as PackageInstallerService
participant InstallingAsyncTask as InstallingAsyncTask
participant PackageInstallerSession as PackageInstallerSession
participant Handler as Handler
participant mHandlerCallback as mHandlerCallback
participant PkMS as PkMS
participant PkMS.PackageHandler as PkMS.PackageHandler
participant PkMS.HandlerParams as PkMS.HandlerParams
participant PkMS.InstallParams as PkMS.InstallParams

InstallInstalling..onCreate()
InstallInstalling..createSession()

PackageInstaller..createSession()
PackageInstallerService..sessionId

InstallInstalling..sessionId
InstallInstalling..onResume()
InstallInstalling..execute()

InstallingAsyncTask..doInBackground()
PackageInstallerSession..openSession(sessionId)
PackageInstallerSession..openWrite()
PackageInstallerSession..doPostExecute()
PackageInstallerSession..commit()

PackageInstallerSession..sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
mHandlerCallback..handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)
Handler..handleCommit()
PackageInstallerSession..commitNonStagedLocked()
PackageInstallerSession..installStage()

PkMS..sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
PkMS.PackageHandler..startCopy()
PkMS.HandlerParams..handleStartCopy()
PkMS.InstallParams..handleReturnCode()

PkMS.InstallParams..processPendingInstall()
PkMS.InstallParams..processInstallRequestsAsync()
PkMS.InstallParams..installPackagesTracedLI()
PkMS.InstallParams..installPackagesLI()
PkMS.InstallParams..preparePackageLI()
PkMS.InstallParams..scanPackageTracedLI()
PkMS.InstallParams..commitPackagesLocked()
PkMS.InstallParams..commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
PkMS.InstallParams..commitPackageSettings()

@enduml
